phases.name: Phase 18: Structured Logging with Levels & JSON

tasks.content: Design logger API with levels (debug/info/warn/error) and format (pretty/json)
Implement logger using pino or custom simple JSON logger
Add config via env vars (PICLAW_LOG_FORMAT, PICLAW_LOG_LEVEL)
Migrate all console.* to logger (already mostly done)
Add unit tests for logger
Run full test suite to ensure no regressions
Update docs: AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION
Git commit with appropriate message
Analyze coverage report to identify low-covered files (package-commands.ts ~50%, piclaw-package-manager.ts ~54%)
Add unit tests for error handling branches in handleInstallCommand (invalid JSON, missing source, network errors)
Add unit tests for handleRemoveCommand error paths
Add unit tests for handleUpdateCommand error scenarios (git failures, npm view errors)
Add unit tests for PiclawPackageManager methods with complex branching (installGit with existing dir, npm failures)
Replace explicit any in logger.ts with proper generic types (meta?: Record<string, unknown>)
Fix context-logger.ts unused imports and any types
Run coverage again to verify >75%
Update docs (AGENT_METRICS, AGENT_PROFILE, EVOLUTION) with coverage improvements
Git commit
